rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be scoped to their owning component and use only visible identifiers from the AADL model
Deployment binding requirements translate to assign statements in implementation annexes
generic_rules: AGREE contracts use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions
Constants and equations in AGREE are declared with type annotations
Assign statements in AGREE map component outputs to expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Component implementations use assign statements for deployment bindings
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure
Do not copy identifiers from examples; use only those from the current AADL model
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations as AGREE variables
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
